allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in r.items\(\) if k in ['wins','losses','gamesBack','divisionRank','leagueRecord','team']}, indent=2\)\) for rec in d['records'] for r in rec['teamRecords'] if r['team']['id']==121]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) games=[] for date in d.get\('dates',[]\): for g in date.get\('games',[]\): games.append\({'date':date['date'],'state':g['status']['abstractGameState'],'detailed':g['status']['detailedState'],'away':g['teams']['away']['team']['name'],'home':g['teams']['home']['team']['name'],'awayScore':g['teams']['away'].get\('score'\),'homeScore':g['teams']['home'].get\('score'\),'gameDate':g['gameDate']}\) print\(json.dumps\(games, indent=2\)\) ")
